---
title: "PhillyStat360 — 04e: Operational thresholds & capacity flags (R port)"
output: html_document
---

R port of `code/python/04e_operational_thresholds.ipynb`. Translates
`ensemble_prob` into a deployable flag list using a per-ward inspection budget.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libs}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
})

ROOT       <- here::here()
PY_PATH    <- file.path(ROOT, "data_py")
OUT_PATH   <- PY_PATH
GRAPH_PATH <- file.path(ROOT, "graphs", "python")
dir.create(GRAPH_PATH, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

## 1. Load merged parcel-level frame

```{r load}
src <- file.path(OUT_PATH, "vs_city_vpi_parcel.csv")
stopifnot(file.exists(src))
df <- read_csv(src, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  mutate(parcel_number = str_trim(as.character(parcel_number)))

if (!"geographic_ward" %in% names(df)) {
  p04b <- read_csv(file.path(PY_PATH, "predictions_04b.csv"),
                   col_select = c("parcel_number", "geographic_ward"),
                   show_col_types = FALSE) |>
    mutate(parcel_number = str_trim(as.character(parcel_number)))
  df <- df |> left_join(p04b, by = "parcel_number")
}

cat(sprintf("Parcels: %d | wards: %d | citywide ovs: %.4f%%\n",
            nrow(df),
            length(unique(na.omit(df$geographic_ward))),
            100 * mean(df$ovs)))
```

## 2. Capacity policy (per-ward top-N)

```{r flag}
CAPACITY_PCT <- 0.01

flagged <- df |>
  filter(!is.na(geographic_ward)) |>
  group_by(geographic_ward) |>
  arrange(desc(ensemble_prob), .by_group = TRUE) |>
  mutate(rank_in_ward = row_number(),
         cap = pmax(1L, as.integer(ceiling(n() * CAPACITY_PCT))),
         model_flag = as.integer(rank_in_ward <= cap)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(parcel_number, model_flag)

df <- df |> left_join(flagged, by = "parcel_number") |>
  mutate(model_flag = replace_na(model_flag, 0L))

cat(sprintf("Model-flagged: %d (%.2f%%)\n",
            sum(df$model_flag), 100 * mean(df$model_flag)))
cat(sprintf("VPI-flagged:   %d (%.2f%%)\n",
            sum(df$vpi_flag), 100 * mean(df$vpi_flag)))
```

## 3. Headline precision-at-capacity

```{r headline}
perf <- function(rule) {
  flag <- df[[rule]]
  n_flag <- sum(flag == 1)
  tp <- sum(flag == 1 & df$ovs == 1)
  fn <- sum(flag == 0 & df$ovs == 1)
  tibble(rule = rule, n_flagged = n_flag,
         precision = if (n_flag > 0) tp / n_flag else NA_real_,
         recall    = if ((tp + fn) > 0) tp / (tp + fn) else NA_real_,
         tp = tp)
}

df$union_flag <- as.integer(df$model_flag == 1 | df$vpi_flag == 1)
results <- bind_rows(perf("model_flag"), perf("vpi_flag"), perf("union_flag"))
print(results)
write_csv(results, file.path(OUT_PATH, "operational_precision_at_capacity.csv"))
```

## 4. Per-ward comparison

```{r per-ward}
ward_compare <- df |>
  filter(!is.na(geographic_ward)) |>
  group_by(geographic_ward) |>
  summarise(
    n_parcels = n(),
    n_ovs     = sum(ovs == 1),
    cap       = pmax(1L, as.integer(ceiling(n() * CAPACITY_PCT))),
    model_tp  = sum(model_flag == 1 & ovs == 1),
    vpi_tp    = sum(vpi_flag == 1 & ovs == 1),
    vpi_n     = sum(vpi_flag),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(model_precision = model_tp / cap,
         vpi_precision   = ifelse(vpi_n > 0, vpi_tp / vpi_n, NA_real_)) |>
  arrange(desc(n_ovs))

ward_compare |> head(15)
write_csv(ward_compare, file.path(OUT_PATH, "operational_flags_by_ward.csv"))
```

## 5. Per-ward precision plot

```{r ward-plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
sub <- ward_compare |> filter(n_ovs >= 5) |> drop_na(vpi_precision, model_precision)
lim <- max(c(sub$vpi_precision, sub$model_precision, 0.5)) * 1.05

wp <- ggplot(sub, aes(vpi_precision, model_precision, size = n_parcels)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, color = "#1f77b4") +
  geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", color = "gray") +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, lim), ylim = c(0, lim)) +
  labs(title = sprintf("Above diagonal = model beats VPI (top %.0f%%/ward)",
                       100 * CAPACITY_PCT),
       x = "VPI precision per ward",
       y = sprintf("Model precision @ top %.0f%% per ward", 100 * CAPACITY_PCT)) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(file.path(GRAPH_PATH, "operational_precision_at_capacity.png"),
       wp, width = 10, height = 5, dpi = 200)
wp
```
